title: Red Earth LCL and things I dont understand
display_title: Red Earth LCL and things I dont understand
wikitext:
[]: Red Earth, LCL, and things I don't understand.             Quote Post by Rawinder » Fri Jul 21, 2006 5:09 pm I've been analyzing NGE for quite a while (though it's nothing compared to the time many others have put into it), and I still do not understand the purpose of the Red Earth Purification Ceremony, or what exactly the Red Earth is (and how it relates to LCL). To start, here's a glossary of terms I'll be using. Adam-based ecosystem: A world where the water is pink and the sky is green. Lilims can't survive here, but (presumably) Angels can. Since Evas are copies of Adam, they also thrive in this type of ecosystem (which is why Nerv contains the Evas in this pink water). This type of ecosystem has been described as a world of death, the "real Dead Sea," and a world purified of original sin. Lilith-based ecosystem: A world in which organisms born from Lilith (Lilims) can live in. Presumably, this is the world as we know it: the Earth with blue sky and blue water. Pre-existing Angels can survive, and even grow, in this environment but new Angels can't be born here (presumably because a Lilith-based ecosystem doesn't contain whatever matter that composes an Angel's body. LCL: Lilith's "body fluid" that contains all the organic materials needed to create Lilim bodies. LCL is colored orange. Red Earth: I don't know. Red Earth Purification Ceremony: I don't know this either. With that out of the way, I can't make heads or tails of what the Red Earth is, and how it (and it's purification ceremony factor) factor into Third Impact. Moreover, I don't understand why the world is red. If the Lilim world is blue, and the sea of LCL is orange, how does a combination of the two result in red? Also, Gendo calls the South Pole (which has become an Adam-based ecosystem following Second Impact) a world purified of original sin. Why is that? The Angels don't have original sin. Was this what the purification ceremony was for, cleasning people of their sins before Complementation occured? And if so, why is the world colored red as a result? Is the Red Earth an alternate Lilith-based ecosystem? One cookie if you understood this post, two cookies if you can even attempt to answer my (various) questions.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Jul 21, 2006 5:40 pm Two things that spring to mind... One; from RCB: [Red Earth Purification Ceremony (AKICHI NO MISOGI)] A phrase spoken by the members of SEELE in episode 26' when the Geofront reverts into the Egg of Lilith - the "Black Moon". "Misogi" is a religious ceremony in which the body is purified by bathing in water -- and thus by extension refers to any means used to purify or sanctify a certain object. While there are theories that the etymology of "Adam", the progenitor of the human race, is "red" or "earth" , its connection with "Red Earth" is unclear.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Jul 21, 2006 10:40 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Two things that spring to mind... One; from RCB: [Red Earth Purification Ceremony (AKICHI NO MISOGI)] A phrase spoken by the members of SEELE in episode 26' when the Geofront reverts into the Egg of Lilith - the "Black Moon". "Misogi" is a religious ceremony in which the body is purified by bathing in water -- and thus by extension refers to any means used to purify or sanctify a certain object. While there are theories that the etymology of "Adam", the progenitor of the human race, is "red" or "earth" , its connection with "Red Earth" is unclear.

[]: Re: Red Earth, LCL, and things I don't understand.             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 21, 2006 11:22 pm @Rawinder: Just FYI, your "glossary" states a couple of assumptions as if they were not. Rawinder wrote: Since Evas are copies of Adam, they also thrive in this type of ecosystem (which is why Nerv contains the Evas in this pink water).

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sat Jul 22, 2006 3:25 am Red Earth: I don't know. Red Earth Purification Ceremony: I don't know this either.

[]: Re: Red Earth, LCL, and things I don't understand.             Quote Post by Rawinder » Sat Jul 22, 2006 6:13 pm Reichu wrote: @Rawinder: Just FYI, your "glossary" states a couple of assumptions as if they were not.

[]: Re: Red Earth, LCL, and things I don't understand.             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jul 22, 2006 6:45 pm Rawinder wrote: With that out of the way, I can't make heads or tails of what the Red Earth is, and how it (and it's purification ceremony factor) factor into Third Impact. Moreover, I don't understand why the world is red. If the Lilim world is blue, and the sea of LCL is orange, how does a combination of the two result in red?

[]: Re: Red Earth, LCL, and things I don't understand.             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Sun Jul 23, 2006 2:31 am Rawinder wrote: Legend of the Past wrote: There is no Lilith or Adam ecosystem, as far as I know. Where have you heard it?

[]: Re: Red Earth, LCL, and things I don't understand.             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jul 23, 2006 11:44 am Rawinder wrote: I don't think I made it up. We know the South Pole has become an Adam-based ecosystem, we know the water at the South Pole has become pink, and we know that NERV submerges the Evas into that same pink water for various reasons (regeneration comes to mind).

[]: Re: Red Earth, LCL, and things I don't understand.             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Jul 25, 2006 10:02 am Reichu wrote: (I wonder if all of those poor souls are still floating around down there, though.)
